remarks: You'll love living in this bright and charming 3-bedroom, 1.5-bath updated antique Colonial located in Wilton's Historic District. Just a short walk to Georgetown's local eateries and Caraluzzi's, with easy access to both Wilton and Ridgefield town centers, this home offers the perfect blend of character, comfort, and convenience.  Oversized windows fill the home with natural light, while the open floor plan showcases wide-plank floors, a beautifully updated kitchen with granite countertops, and French doors leading to a stone patio overlooking 1.49 acres of professionally landscaped property, complete with stone walls and steps leading to native gardens. The dining room features a skylight and dramatic bay window, and the open living/family room includes a cozy reading/music nook and wood stove. A half bath and laundry room complete the main level.  Upstairs, the primary bedroom offers a large walk-in closet, alongside two additional bedrooms with charming built-ins and a vintage-style full bath. Listed on the National Register of Historic Places, this special property is also part of the Pollinator Pathway Project and designated as a Certified National Wildlife Habitat. City water connected! Peaceful and private, yet conveniently located near Route 7, shopping, the train, and more.
